assertions.evidence: Response provides 6-stage migration process with detailed explanations of each step
Response clearly contrasts manual versioning (hand-bumped versions, written changelogs, human errors) with automated (commit-driven, deterministic, audit trail)
Response identifies 10 major pitfalls with explanations of impact and solutions
Response explains Conventional Commits types (feat, fix, chore, docs, refactor, test, perf) and when to use each
Response addresses non-conventional commit handling, backup of old changelog, and transition point documentation
